name: 908 Devices Inc.
business: 908 Devices Inc. develops and sells handheld chemical analysis devices that use proprietary mass spectrometry and optical spectroscopy technologies. Its products are used at the point-of-need for applications such as detecting fentanyl, explosives, and hazardous chemicals. The company's customers include federal and state government agencies, military, and first responders.
sellsTo: United States state authorities and local municipalities
Rest of world national and provincial organizations

exposures.sentence: We have developed an innovative suite of purpose-built handheld devices for point-of-need chemical analysis.
Our customers are primarily in the government market and to a lesser extent, the life sciences market.
The device s machine-learning software, enabled by our proprietary technology platform, serves as a critical element of the device.

catalysts.event: Completed sale of Desktop Portfolio to Repligen Corporation
catalysts.sentence: On March 4, 2025, the Company completed the sale of its Desktop Portfolio to Repligen.
